action: Presented the user with a set of reflective questions and a prompt to guide them in seeking further spiritual support after viewing the thought of the day.
fallback_action: If the prompt cannot be delivered, notify the user that the guidance questions could not be sent and offer to assist manually.

recipe.steps: Draft a message with reflective questions prompting the user to consider areas where they may seek spiritual guidance after reflecting on the thought of the day.
Send the drafted message to the user in real-time.
